name: B. A. Rolfe
abstract: Benjamin Albert Rolfe (October 24, 1879 – April 23, 1956) was an American musician known as "The Boy Trumpet Wonder" who went on to be a bandleader, recording artist, radio personality, and film producer.

concerts.label: Fordham University Band: John Philip Sousa Memorial Concert

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: this is 18 to 20 numbers patterned after the Lucky Strike, B. A. Rolfe thing
